universities.name: University of Washington
universities.reason: Strong reputation in STEM fields, including Computer Science and Mathematics, and ranked in the top 5 for entrepreneurship by Princeton Review and Entrepreneur Magazine.

universities.name: Stanford University
universities.reason: Widely recognized for its excellence in Computer Science and Mathematics, with robust undergraduate research opportunities and a strong focus on entrepreneurship.

universities.name: University of California, Berkeley
universities.reason: Offers well-regarded programs in Computer Science and Mathematics with active research opportunities and a vibrant entrepreneurship ecosystem through the Haas School of Business.

universities.name: California Institute of Technology (Caltech)
universities.reason: Renowned for cutting-edge research in STEM fields, including Computer Science and Mathematics, and offers a smaller campus environment.

universities.name: Oregon State University
universities.reason: Strong programs in STEM, including Computer Science and Mathematics, with supportive undergraduate research opportunities and entrepreneurship initiatives.
